name: Fourpane
description: Window cells quartered by a clean cross of muntins, panes re-glazing on reseed.

code.style: --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { background: var(--color1); :before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 6%; top: 6%; width: 40%; height: 40%; background: @p(var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; right: 6%; bottom: 6%; width: 40%; height: 40%; background: @p(var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; } } -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
